record.field:
<data> <!-- Remove the screen action buttons from their current position --> <xpath expr="/tree/button[@name='checked_in']" position="replace"/> <xpath expr="/tree/button[@name='call']" position="replace"/> <xpath expr="/tree/button[@name='in_atention']" position="replace"/>
<!-- Remove appointment_date (date widget) from its current position --> <xpath expr="/tree/field[@name='appointment_date'][@widget='date']" position="replace"/>
<!-- Remove appointment_date (time widget) from its current position --> <xpath expr="/tree/field[@name='appointment_date'][@widget='time']" position="replace"/>
<!-- Remove healthprof from its current position --> <xpath expr="/tree/field[@name='healthprof']" position="replace"/>
<!-- Remove the original no_show button so we can place it after En atención --> <xpath expr="/tree/button[@name='no_show']" position="replace"/>
<!-- Keep patient immediately after healthprof --> <xpath expr="/tree/field[@name='patient']" position="replace"/> <xpath expr="/tree/field[@name='phone']" position="replace"/> <xpath expr="/tree/field[@name='dni']" position="replace"/> <xpath expr="/tree/field[@name='age']" position="replace"/> <xpath expr="/tree/field[@name='gender']" position="replace"/> <xpath expr="/tree/field[@name='hc']" position="replace"/> <xpath expr="/tree/field[@name='chronic']" position="replace"/> <xpath expr="/tree/field[@name='current_insurance']" position="replace"/> <xpath expr="/tree/field[@name='state']" position="before"> <field name="healthprof" expand="1" width="300"/> <field name="patient" expand="1" width="300"/> <field name="appointment_date" string="Date" widget="date"/> <field name="appointment_date" string="Time" widget="time"/> <button name="checked_in" help="The patient has arrived and is waiting" string="Checked in"/> <button name="call" help="" string="Llamar"/> <button name="in_atention" help="" string="En atención"/> <button name="no_show" help="The patient did not show up" string="No show"/> <field name="phone"/> <field name="dni" expand="1"/> <field name="age" expand="1"/> <field name="gender" expand="1"/> <field name="hc" expand="1"/> <field name="chronic" expand="1"/> <field name="current_insurance" expand="1"/> </xpath> </data>
